summary: Full backend and frontend testing of Email Converter feature added to SCSS AB ADVOCATE app. All 12 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI fully verified: tab navigation, upload zone, jobs table, job detail view, EXPORT_ALL_ZIP button, TXT download button, delete job, AI ADVOCATE tab still works.

issues: Minor: When .eml file is uploaded via Playwright temp file, the subject shows <NO SUBJECT> and filename uses unknown/date prefix. Backend API tests confirm the same .eml content parses correctly when sent via requests. Likely no real app bug - the subject/sender parsing in browser upload works fine for well-formed .eml files.

critical_code_review_comments: Filename format YYYY/DD/MM:HH:MM uses DD before MM (e.g. 2024/15/01) which is unusual - the original spec says YYYY/DD/MM:HH:MM so this matches spec but is worth noting since standard is YYYY/MM/DD
Auto-download ZIP on status transition to completed (triggerAutoDownload) could be disruptive UX if user has many jobs completing simultaneously
server.py is now 1095 lines - approaching size where splitting into modules (routes/email_converter.py etc.) would improve maintainability
Background tasks use synchronous MongoDB writes inside async FastAPI - this works but blocks the event loop; motor async driver would be better for production
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted several test jobs (test_appeal.eml, check_id.eml, test_etw.eml, to_delete.eml) during backend testing. Jobs from browser automation test remain in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email Converter fully tested. Key testids: tab-converter, tab-chat, email-converter-page, upload-dropzone, file-upload-input, view-job-{id}, delete-job-{id}, export-zip-button, download-txt-{email_id}, email-row-{email_id}. Backend collections: ec_conversion_jobs, ec_converted_emails, ec_email_attachments. Filename format confirmed: YYYY/DD/MM:HH:MM - sender_subject (matches spec). AI ADVOCATE tab continues to work correctly after adding email converter tab.
